From: <sip:34020000001320000001@example.com>;tag=2
To: <sip:34020000002000000001@example.com>
Call-ID: header-norm-001@example.com
CSeq: 1 register

Content-Type: application/manscdp+xml
Content-Length: 158

<?xml version="1.0"?>

    <CmdType>Keepalive</CmdType>
    <SN>2</SN>
